en: Document must be issued within 30 days of submission.
Please upload the AEAT Tax Compliance Certificate (Certificado de estar al corriente de las obligaciones tributarias), issued by the Agencia Estatal de Administración Tributaria (AEAT).
As an authorized signatory, I confirm that Tax Contributions are up-to-date and records are available upon request.
The Issue date must be within the last 30 days
Does your company pay taxes to the Tax Agency in Spain (Agencia Estatal de Administración Tributaria)?
